simple_left.timer_hint: Total length of the countdown video
simple_left.bg_hint: Video takes priority over image — both optional (default: black)
simple_left.preview_empty: No preview yet — choose a background or click Refresh

settings.bg_color_hint: Color used when no video or image is selected
settings.music_fade_dur_hint: How long the music fades out at the end
settings.music_in_outro_hint: On: music plays until video end  |  Off: music stops at timer 0:00
settings.intro_fade_hint: Video fades in from black at the start
settings.outro_fade_hint: Video fades out to black at the end
settings.slider_from_hint: Show images when X minutes remain
settings.slider_until_hint: No more images from X remaining minutes
settings.img_dur_hint: How long each image is displayed
settings.slider_loop_hint: Loop on: image → timer → image → ...  |  Loop off: all images once
settings.slider_fill_color_hint: Color of the bars for non-16:9 images (e.g. portrait)
settings.fade_hint: Smooth fade in/out when switching to images
settings.sub_size_hint: Size of the subtitle text in the video
settings.sub_offset_hint: How many lines between timer and subtitle
settings.outro_enable_hint: Image with text after the timer
settings.outro_text_hint: Displayed centered on the outro slide
settings.outro_bg_hint: Image takes priority — color is used when no image is set
settings.outro_font_hint: Independent of timer — only for the outro slide
settings.outro_font_size_hint: Text size on the outro slide
settings.outro_dur_hint: How long the outro slide is displayed
settings.outro_fadein_hint: Crossfade from timer to outro slide
settings.outro_fadeout_hint: Fade out outro slide to black
settings.language_hint: The selected language is applied immediately
settings.sounds_hint: Plays a sound when the video is done or an error occurs

dialogs.error_ffmpeg_msg:
FFmpeg is required for background music.

Please place ffmpeg.exe in assets/bin/.
dialogs.error_pdf_msg:
PyMuPDF (fitz) is not installed.

Please install it with:
  pip install PyMuPDF
dialogs.reset_msg:
Reset all settings to defaults?

This cannot be undone.
